title: How can I send a co-worker a link directly to group?
excerpt: So we have huge board with many groups with items. I want to send my co-worker a link directly to a group halfway on the board. I can’t figure out how to do that.

posts.author: Dio (Dio)
posts.cookedHtml: So we have huge board with many groups with items. I want to send my co-worker a link directly to a group halfway on the board. I can’t figure out how to do that.

posts.author: Dio (Dio)
posts.cookedHtml: No one? Nothing? It’s not a huge deal, but I can’t be the only one, right?
